requirements.summary: Minimal smoke-test fixture spec used to validate the materialization pipeline.

user_stories.capability: run a smoke test against the spec materialization pipeline
user_stories.outcome: I can catch regressions before they reach production

acceptance_criteria.then: three Markdown files are produced and each is non-empty

design.approach: Use a pre-canned fixture to bypass LLM dependency and keep the test fast and deterministic.

components.name: Smoke Fixture
components.purpose: Provides deterministic SpecBundle input for the e2e smoke test

design.data_model: No persistent data model. Input is the SpecBundle; output is three Markdown files.
design.sequence:
1. Load fixture JSON
2. Validate against SpecBundle schema
3. Materialize into tmp_path
4. Assert files exist and contain expected headers

tasks.title: Validate smoke test fixture materializes correctly
tasks.done_when: All three Markdown files are produced and each is non-empty.
